query: SELECT pc.id, c.name as cityName, pc.venueRentAmount, pc.venueDeposit, pc.venueLeaseStartDate, pc.venueLeaseEndDate, pc.venuePaymentCycle, pc.venueContractFileUrl FROM partner_cities pc JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%若곫끼%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT pc.id, c.name as cityName, pc.venueRentAmount, pc.venueDeposit, pc.venueLeaseStartDate, pc.venueLeaseEndDate, pc.venuePaymentCycle, pc.venueContractFileUrl FROM partner_cities pc JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%若곫끼%';
